case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. THANG NGOC PHAM

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR  STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR  STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, THANG NGOC DBA TURTLE TOWER RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR  STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHAM, THANG NGOC DBA TURTLE TOWER RESTAURANT $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
